_comment: Content pillars beyond feature ads. Weights are the long-run target mix (sum=1.0; seasonal is override-only, not in the balance). weekday_theme softly biases which pillar a given weekday leans toward (0=Mon..6=Sun). guidance/format/display drive caption + image synthesis. pools hold the rotating content items for non-feature, non-review pillars.

guidance.education: Teach ONE concept clearly and simply. Build trust, do not hard-sell. End with a soft nudge to the app.
guidance.tips: Give one practical, save-worthy tip for the audience. Specific and actionable.
guidance.interactive: Ask a short, inviting question that sparks comments. No selling.
guidance.social_proof: Share a real user's positive experience as warm, credible social proof.
guidance.seasonal: Tie the app to the season or holiday naturally and warmly. Keep it timely.

education.title: How GPS measures your land
education.short: GPS reads satellite signals to fix each corner of your plot, then calculates the area between those points.
education.benefit: Understand why digital measuring is trustworthy.

education.title: Acres vs hectares, made simple
education.short: 1 hectare is about 2.47 acres. Knowing both helps when buyers and sellers use different units.
education.benefit: Never get confused by land units again.

education.title: Latitude & longitude, explained
education.short: Latitude lines run east-west, longitude lines run north-south. Together they pinpoint any spot on Earth.

education.title: The math behind area from points
education.short: From a few GPS corners, the app uses the shoelace formula to compute the exact enclosed area.
education.benefit: Trust the number behind your measurement.

education.title: Feet, meters, miles: when to use which
education.short: Use meters for fields, feet for small jobs, miles or kilometers for travel. The right unit makes numbers easier to act on.
education.benefit: Pick the unit that fits the job.

tips.title: Estimate fencing in minutes
tips.short: Measure your boundary distance first, then multiply by your fence cost per unit length. No guesswork.
tips.benefit: Budget fencing without a contractor visit.

tips.title: Verify a plot before you buy
tips.short: Walk the plot and measure the area yourself before signing. Confirm it matches the listing.
tips.benefit: Avoid paying for land you don't get.

tips.title: Plan a multi-stop trip the smart way
tips.short: Add all your stops, drag them into the best order, and follow one optimized route.
tips.benefit: Save fuel and time on busy days.

tips.title: Document work with stamped photos
tips.short: Use the GPS camera to capture proof-of-location photos with date and address baked in.
tips.benefit: Have evidence for claims and records.

interactive.title: Acres or hectares — which do you use?
interactive.short: Drop your answer in the comments. We're curious what your region prefers!

interactive.title: What's the biggest area you've measured?
interactive.short: Share your record in the comments — acres, hectares, anything goes.

interactive.title: Voice navigation or typing — your pick?
interactive.short: Do you speak your destination or type it? Let us know how you navigate.

social_proof_fallback.title: Loved by land owners everywhere
social_proof_fallback.short: Thousands use FieldCalc to measure plots, plan routes, and document work in the field.
social_proof_fallback.benefit: Join a growing community measuring smarter.

social_proof_fallback.title: Trusted in the field every day
social_proof_fallback.short: Farmers, surveyors, and drivers rely on FieldCalc for accurate measurement on the go.
social_proof_fallback.benefit: See why people keep it on their home screen.
social_proof_fallback.cta: Try it free — link in bio
